## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Validation

- [ ] `./bin/python-quality.sh`
- [ ] `npm run lint:frontend`
- [ ] `npm run build:frontend`
- [ ] Manual smoke test (if UI/behavior changed)

## Risk and rollout notes

State any user-facing risk, migration steps, or follow-up actions.
